# Anduril Building Arsenal-1 Hyperscale Manufacturing Facility in Ohio

Anduril, a leader in autonomous systems and weapons manufacturing, today announced it has selected Columbus, Ohio as the location of Arsenal-1, its first hyperscale manufacturing facility.
